opportunity_summary: PUE 1.09 in summer with patented water-cooling since 2003, no chillers or mechanical cooling. 6 halls (BHS1-BHS6), ~90,000 servers with capacity for 3x more. Adjacent to Hydro-Quebec 1,903MW dam. WUE below 0.2l/kWh vs 1.8l/kWh industry average.
notes: OVHcloud manufactures its own liquid-cooled servers on-site at Beauharnois factory. PUE 1.09 verified for summer months; company-wide average PUE is 1.28. Address: 40 Rue De L'Industrie, Beauharnois, QC. MW capacity not publicly disclosed. Delta T = 20K. 100% hydro power.

opportunity_summary: 2MW facility with OVHcloud proprietary water-cooling technology. 1,000 sqm, 10,000 server capacity. Opened March 2024. $145M CAD investment in Toronto area. Qualifies on both capacity (<=10MW) and liquid cooling.
notes: Address: 17 Vondrau Dr, Cambridge, ON N3E 1B8. Inside Ascent TOR1 hyperscale development. OVHcloud second Canadian hub after Beauharnois. Uses same water-cooling technology as BHS.

operator_company: University of Waterloo / SHARCNET / Digital Research Alliance of Canada
opportunity_summary: Canada's first immersion-cooled supercomputer. 9 single-phase immersion tanks + direct-to-chip liquid cooling for GPU subsystems. 752 nodes, 134,400 CPU cores, 288 NVIDIA H100 GPUs. Waste heat recycled to warm adjacent Quantum-Nano Centre. $50M system.
notes: Located at EC5, 305 Phillip Street, Waterloo ON. Built by Hypertec with Nokia DC Fabric. 15 petaFLOPs peak. 25PB VAST Data flash storage. Supports 4,000+ researchers, 19 SHARCNET institutions. Top 500 supercomputer.

opportunity_summary: PUE 1.15 using free air cooling and hot/cold aisle containment. 10,000 sq ft within 790,000 sq ft complex. 600 tons N+1 cooling capacity. 99% renewable hydro power. Commissioned 2021.
notes: Address: 3000 Rene-Levesque Blvd West, Montreal QC (Nun's Island). Carrier neutral with Montreal Internet Exchange (QIX). Chilled water system. 150W/sqft load design.

opportunity_summary: 7.5MW facility qualifies on capacity (<=10MW). Carrier neutral colocation in downtown Winnipeg. Powered by Manitoba Hydro (98%+ hydroelectric). 1,100 tonnes cooling capacity. 172,147 sqft building footprint.
notes: Address: 360 Portage Avenue, Winnipeg MB R3C 0G8. Inside Manitoba Hydro Place HQ (LEED Platinum, 23-story). Four Liebert AC units (2x7.5T, 2x10T). Geothermal in building HVAC.

opportunity_summary: PUE 1.20, 3.5MW, Uptime Tier III design. Chilled water system supports ultra-high density up to 100kW/cabinet for GPU workloads. 2N redundancy all systems. Qualifies on PUE (1.20) and capacity (<=10MW).
notes: Address: 4701 Tahoe Blvd, Mississauga ON. 29,000 sqft total, 6,420 sqft raised floor. Acquired from TeraGo 2022. Indoor generator facility off-grounds.

opportunity_summary: 1MW small facility qualifies on capacity (<=10MW). Tier I with N+1/2N cooling redundancy. 15,340 sqft total, 7,500 sqft raised floor. Ideal candidate for liquid cooling retrofit.
notes: Address: 27 Buttermill Ave, Vaughan ON. Acquired from TeraGo 2022 (originally Data Centers Canada).

opportunity_summary: 1MW facility qualifies on capacity (<=10MW). Chilled water supports high density >30kW/cabinet. Downtown Vancouver carrier hotel. Hydroelectric power. Small footprint ideal for liquid cooling retrofit.
notes: Address: 900 W Hastings St, Vancouver BC. 6,210 sqft. Acquired from TeraGo/RackForce.

opportunity_summary: 0.6MW micro-facility qualifies on capacity (<=10MW). PUE 1.30 does NOT qualify on PUE (needs <=1.20). Sub-1MW size = strong retrofit candidate for liquid cooling.
notes: Address: 701 West Georgia, Vancouver BC. 6,535 sqft. Tier I, N+1 redundancy. Hydroelectric powered.

opportunity_summary: 9MW high-density liquid-cooled facility with PUE 1.20. Qualifies on PUE (1.20), liquid cooling, AND capacity (<=10MW). Chilled-water + free cooling. Rapid deployment: 1-3MW in <150 days. Uptime Tier 3.
notes: Exact Montreal address not publicly disclosed. Two DC regions in Quebec. SSAE-16, SOC2, ISO 27001. 6kW avg/cabinet. 20+ carriers on-site. 100% hydroelectric. Dark fiber interconnected.

opportunity_summary: 6MW facility qualifies on capacity (<=10MW). Uptime Tier III certified (design + construction). 100,923 sqft purpose-built. 568 tons N+1 cooling. Brookfield Infrastructure rebranded from Cyxtera/Evoque 2024.
notes: Address: 4175 14th Avenue, Markham ON L3R 5R5. UPS 3.4MW N+1, Gen 6MW N+1. 27 min from Pearson Airport.

opportunity_summary: 2.7MW Tier III facility qualifies on capacity (<=10MW). Chilled water cooling, N+1 redundancy. 4,900 sqft. SOC2 Type 2, ASHRAE compliant. Crown corporation operator.
notes: Address: 745 66th Street, Saskatoon SK. Historical 100% portfolio uptime. 45U/half/third rack options.

opportunity_summary: PUE as low as 1.1, 1.5MW facility. Qualifies on BOTH PUE (<=1.20) and capacity (<=10MW). 28,000 sqft, 7,000 sqft raised floor. N+1 power and cooling redundancy. Up to 20kW/rack.
notes: Address: 2 Robert Speck Parkway, Suite 500, Mississauga ON L4Z 1H8. CentriLogic Canadian HQ. SSAE 16 SOC 2 Type 2, CSAE 3416, PCI DSS certified. Opened 2015. 10,000 sqft expansion planned.

opportunity_summary: 0.5MW (500kW) micro-facility qualifies on capacity (<=10MW). 15,000 sqft with 18-inch raised floor. N+1 cooling redundancy. SSAE 16 SOC 2 certified. Small facility ideal for liquid cooling pilot.
notes: Address: 215 Traders Blvd E, Unit 11, Mississauga ON L4Z 3K5. Hot/cold aisle containment. PCI DSS compliant.

opportunity_summary: 850-acre AI/HPC site 20km south of Pincher Creek. Initial 100MW natural gas, scalable to 4GW. Targeting ~130MW by end 2026. Captus Energy acquisition CAD$27M. Carbon capture planned. Pipeline opportunity.
notes: Dual natural gas, grid connection, non-potable water, dual fiber. 130MW is planned generation, not confirmed IT load. Cooling type not disclosed. Very early stage. Likely to need liquid cooling for AI workloads.

operator_company: AVAIO Digital Partners / ADAM Real Estate (JV)
opportunity_summary: Scalable to 50MW sustainable hyperscale facility. Between Ottawa and Montreal. Serves federal/private demand in capital region. 100% Quebec hydro power. Pipeline opportunity for cooling vendor engagement.
notes: Announced 2022. Timeline and Phase 1 size not disclosed. Cooling specs not disclosed. Positioned to complement Toronto and Montreal DC markets.

opportunity_summary: 54MW hyperscale expansion under construction. C$225M CPP/Deutsche Bank financing. Pre-leased to GPU-focused AI cloud compute provider. High probability of liquid cooling given AI/GPU focus. Pipeline opportunity.
notes: Ascent TOR1 development area (17 Vondrau Dr, Cambridge ON). Tenant not publicly named. CPP Investments 50% of construction loan. Announced July 2025.
